name: Hiroshi Tanaka
title: President & CEO
bio: Visionary leader with over 25 years of banking experience in Japan and Asia. Built Hokuyo Bank's reputation for stability and customer service excellence across the region.

name: Yuki Yamamoto
title: Chief Operating Officer
bio: Operations executive managing all business segments with focus on efficiency and customer satisfaction. Drives digital transformation initiatives across Hokuyo's operations.

name: Takeshi Nakamura
title: Chief Financial Officer
bio: Finance expert managing capital allocation and financial strategy. Ensures prudent risk management and maintains the bank's strong financial position.

name: Kenji Suzuki
title: Chief Investment Officer
bio: Leads investment decisions and portfolio strategy across all banking divisions. Responsible for maximizing returns while maintaining risk discipline.

name: Akiko Sato
title: Head of Retail Banking
bio: Oversees Hokuyo's $85B retail banking portfolio. Focuses on innovative products and services for individual customers across Japan and beyond.

name: Masao Kobayashi
title: Head of Corporate Banking
bio: Manages corporate banking relationships and enterprise lending strategy. Serves as trusted financial partner for Japan's leading corporations.

name: Emi Watanabe
title: Head of Investment Banking
bio: Leads mergers and acquisitions, capital markets, and investment banking services. Facilitates strategic transactions for major institutional clients.

name: Daichi Yamada
title: Head of Wealth Management
bio: Oversees premium wealth advisory and asset management services. Provides tailored financial solutions for high-net-worth individuals and families.

name: Sakura Nakajima
title: Chief Risk Officer
bio: Establishes comprehensive risk management framework and ensures regulatory compliance. Protects the bank's capital and stakeholder interests.

name: Toshiro Ishikawa
title: General Counsel
bio: Leads legal and compliance teams, manages corporate governance. Ensures adherence to banking regulations and facilitates strategic initiatives.
